title: One Hundred Years of Solitude
html: Stub. Gabriel García Márquez, 1967. Yahir read it through 2022 and kept a running chapter-by-chapter log in 2022 03 11 one hundred years of solitude reading log (Chapters 7 through 20). His notes pull out cyclical time, lineage repetition, and the Macondo banana-company massacre.
